title: Amazing FPS Booster
description: Play the game with zero lag.
body:
![AFB Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Amazing_FPS_Booster/BH_AFB_header.webp)

![AFB Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Amazing_FPS_Booster/BH_AFB_banner1.webp)
Increase FPS and decrease lag in your game with a simple modpack!



**Partnered with Mantle.gg**

Mantle.gg is an amazing way to show off your favorite cosmetics purchasable from the store!

![Normal Minecraft](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Amazing_FPS_Booster/BH_AFB_banner2.webp)
